purpose: Access USGS NWIS streamflow, NLCD land cover, NID dam data

NWIS.get_streamflow.units: cubic feet per second (cfs) — convert to m³/s by dividing by 35.3147
NWIS.get_streamflow.note: Returns pandas DataFrame. Column name IS the gauge_id string.

NWIS.get_info.note: drainage area in square miles. Multiply by 2.58999 for km².

gotchas: NWIS().get_streamflow() gauge IDs must be passed as a list even for a single gauge: ['01031500'].
Date range is inclusive on both ends. Use string format 'YYYY-MM-DD'.
Missing days appear as NaN. Always dropna() or fillna(0) before signature extraction.
NWIS returns data in local time by default for some products — use dates='2000-01-01/2020-12-31' with slash separator for daily values.
NLCD().get_coverage() requires a shapely geometry in EPSG:4326 and returns a dict of {class_code: percentage}.

common_patterns.fetch_daily_streamflow:
from pygeohydro import NWIS
nwis = NWIS()
df = nwis.get_streamflow(['01031500'], dates=('2000-01-01', '2020-12-31'))
q_m3s = df['01031500'] / 35.3147
common_patterns.get_gauge_info:
from pygeohydro import NWIS
info = NWIS().get_info({'site': '01031500'})
row = info.iloc[0]
lat, lon = row['dec_lat_va'], row['dec_long_va']
